elements.content: This is a dedicated keep-with-next performance sample for sealed contained text. The heading should stay socially attached to the next block, but the block itself composes inside its local room and clips locally. That means the expensive part should be the container-level fit probe, not a full surrounding-flow negotiation inside the room. The same paragraph is repeated to make the probe cost easy to measure.
